prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e4888269`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 task package for `e4888269`. The verifier in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e4888269/verifier.py#L4) detects the multicolor 2-column rule strip, reads it top-to-bottom, and applies the substitutions sequentially while restoring the strip and separator each step. The generator in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e4888269/generator.py#L340) produces straight-divider and pocketed-separator layouts, which matches the official family’s small line-separated cases and larger enclosed case.

The summary hint was corrected, not trusted as-is. I documented the mismatch in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e4888269/notes.md#L1): the examples do not use simple descendant closure, they use ordered sequential substitutions. No new DSL primitive was needed.
